description: Color candid photograph showing two law enforcement officers in black tactical gear holding a woman by both arms while walking down a suburban residential sidewalk, all shown from behind. The officer on the left wears a balaclava and a black vest reading 'POLICE / IRS-CI' (IRS Criminal Investigation); the officer on the right is a woman in a black vest reading 'POLICE / FEDERAL AGENT' with a holstered sidearm and duty belt. The woman in the center wears a long black cardigan, light blue jeans, and tan slip-on shoes. The background shows a tree-lined street with parked cars and a flatbed trailer under an overcast sky. There is no on-image text, graphic overlay, agency seal, or design treatment.
notable_text: On-image text only as printed on vests: 'POLICE IRS-CI', 'POLICE FEDERAL AGENT'.
